title: ambrosia sandersonii
intro: Ambrosia sandersonii, also known as Sanderson's ragwort or sand dune burr ragwort, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Ambrosia sandersonii can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
